title: Salesforce Data Cloud and enrichment backend-first contract
salesforce_visible_capabilities: Safe enrichment preview and confidence scoring

existing_domain_foundation: Law Firm OS UI/Salesforce web Mar 2026/showcase.html#Data Cloud
packages/integrations-core/src/service.js synthetic-only external provider descriptor boundary
existing_domain_foundation_properties: server enrichment mode is synthetic_crosswalk and is not a Data Cloud runtime route
matter_core_enrichment currently labels an internal Matter connection and is not external enrichment
Enterprise G7 integration baseline blocks calls_external_provider_api when true
External integration descriptors are synthetic-only until downstream packs explicitly open provider runtime
current_ui_boundary: Client/Matter UI may display existing CRM, Matter, Analytics, and internal Matter connection data from tested routes

Client/Matter UI may not show Data Cloud provider setup, enrichment jobs, identity resolution, unified profile, confidence scoring, segment activation, audience sync, or external enrichment controls before route/provider tests exist
No external provider payload, raw identifier, raw personal contact value, token, consent artifact, or provider match response may be exposed in Client/Matter UI
Existing Matter analytics is not Data Cloud parity

route_policy_contract.service_boundary: Read provider descriptors, data categories, owner decision state, and disabled/enabled flags only; credentials and provider tokens omitted
Register provider descriptor only after owner decision, DPA/privacy review, credential storage design, and disabled-by-default policy; no provider call at registration
Record consent/lawful-basis metadata for enrichment categories; raw consent documents, signatures, and direct personal identifiers omitted
Create metadata-only enrichment job for allowlisted CRM Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, and Matter refs; no provider call or product record mutation at creation
Return safe preview counts, allowed data categories, missing consent states, and match strategy only; raw identifiers and provider payloads omitted
Execute only after provider receipt gate, consent coverage, owner-approved categories, idempotency key, and audit intent; output is safe counts and receipt refs only
Read safe enrichment summaries with provenance, confidence band, and review state only; raw provider fields, raw contact values, and hidden identifiers omitted
Create internal identity-resolution review candidates with safe entity refs and confidence bands; no automatic merge, no canonical Master Data write, and no direct Matter creation
Read safe unified profile labels, linked object refs, provenance, confidence band, and consent state only; raw provider graph and direct personal identifiers omitted
Create audience/segment activation request only after owner-approved destination, consent coverage, provider receipt, audit evidence, and rollback/disable plan

safe_output_rules: provider credentials omitted
OAuth tokens omitted
raw provider payload omitted
new providers disabled by default
tenant_id scoped
consent/lawful-basis metadata required before enrichment execution
raw consent document and signature payloads omitted
sensitive categories require owner decision and legal review
cross-border transfer and retention policy refs required where applicable
job creation mutates no product records
execute requires provider receipt gate and idempotency key
safe output includes counts, category labels, confidence band, provenance refs, and review state only
raw provider payloads and direct personal identifiers omitted
identity resolution creates review candidates only
automatic merge is blocked
canonical Master Data writes are blocked until a separate owner-approved merge contract exists
unified profile output includes provenance and consent state
activation requires destination allowlist
activation requires consent coverage and rollback/disable plan
external activation requires provider receipt
audience member raw identifiers omitted from UI/API response

owner_decisions_required: whether Salesforce Data Cloud, another enrichment provider, or no provider is allowed
data categories permitted for Client, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Matter, Billing, Analytics, and DMS contexts
lawful basis, consent, PIPA/cross-border transfer, DPA, and retention policy
provider credential storage and rotation owner
identity resolution match threshold and human review threshold
whether enriched values may patch CRM runtime facade records or only create review candidates
whether unified profile output may appear in Client/Matter UI
segment activation destination allowlist and rollback/disable policy
external_provider_dependencies: Salesforce Data Cloud API, Salesforce CRM enrichment, or approved third-party provider such as FullContact, Lusha, ZoomInfo, Clearbit, or equivalent
Provider DPA/privacy review and owner decision required before runtime calls
Provider receipt required before execute or activation routes can claim external effect
verification_cases: VC-SF-B-W07-API-001: provider list returns descriptors and no credentials or tokens
VC-SF-B-W07-API-002: provider registration is disabled-by-default and performs no provider call
VC-SF-B-W07-API-003: consent records require data category, lawful basis, retention, and audit metadata
VC-SF-B-W07-API-004: enrichment job creation mutates no product records and allows only stable object refs
VC-SF-B-W07-API-005: enrichment preview returns safe counts, data categories, and missing consent states only
VC-SF-B-W07-API-006: enrichment execution requires provider gate, idempotency, consent coverage, owner policy, and audit receipt
VC-SF-B-W07-API-007: enrichment results omit raw provider payloads, raw contact values, tokens, and hidden identifiers
VC-SF-B-W07-API-008: identity resolution creates review candidates only and blocks automatic merge
VC-SF-B-W07-API-009: unified profile read output includes provenance, confidence band, and consent state without raw provider graph
VC-SF-B-W07-API-010: segment activation requires destination allowlist, provider receipt, and rollback/disable plan

VC-SF-B-W07-UI-001: Client/Matter UI exposes no Data Cloud provider setup, enrichment run, identity resolution, unified profile, confidence score, segment activation, or audience sync controls before route/provider tests pass

required_before_ui_exposure: OMO CodeGraph caller check for Data Cloud provider, enrichment job, identity resolution, unified profile, and segment activation handlers
Hermes MCP check-only: hermes.validate.core and hermes.desktop_authority_boundary
evidence_gate.claim_boundary: Passing this contract validator does not create provider approval, production, deployment, final approval, or enterprise trust claims.
